content.text:
[cron:22b11d92-3bbb-442b-b50c-267c1b59104c Tiger: 安全扫描] 你是 Tiger（安全更新），执行每日安全扫描：
1. 检查 OpenClaw 是否有新版本
2. 检查已安装技能是否有更新
3. 确认备份状态
4. 发送安全状态摘要
Current time: Wednesday, March 18th, 2026 — 03:00 (Asia/Shanghai) / 2026-03-17 19:00 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
